title: Projektmitarbeiter*in Organisation & Prozessoptimierung Marktforschung
required_skills: Erfahrung im Organisations-, Projekt- oder Back-Office-Umfeld
matched_skills: Analytisches Denken / strukturierte Arbeitsweise (via data analysis & reporting background)
Kommunikations- und Teamfähigkeit (cross-functional coordination, C-level storytelling)
Projekt-/Organisationserfahrung (Hapag-Lloyd Project Coordination, HSBC Strategy PMO)
missing_skills: German B2+ (working language is German; candidate only B1+)
Back-office / operational organisation management (direct order processing)
In-house software experience in a market research environment
core_responsibilities: Operatives Organisationsmanagement: Aufträge anlegen, ausschreiben, abrechnen; Termine und Ressourcen planen
Prozessanalyse und -optimierung: bestehende Abläufe dokumentieren, Verbesserungspotenziale identifizieren und mit IT umsetzen
Digitale Weiterentwicklung: Einführung und Ausbau moderner Tools (ClickUp, In-house-Software, KI-Anwendungen)
Wissenstransfer und Team-Enablement: Kolleg*innen bei Tool-Nutzung unterstützen, Best Practices und Trainings mitgestalten
recommended_emphasis: Highlight project and coordination experience at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC (operational alignment, resource planning)
Explicitly mention Excel proficiency (PivotTables, data preparation)
Emphasise process optimisation experience (data quality & tracking from Hapag-Lloyd role)
Address interface role between business and IT (BI tools as a bridge)
Highlight willingness to learn and tool adaptability (PL-300, Qlik, Looker, SAP Analytics)
Present German language level realistically (B1+); optionally mention motivation to improve
Signal long-term career perspective and interest in family-owned companies

scoring_notes.role_fit_note: Role is operational org/process/IT coordination; candidate profile is analytics-heavy. Overlap in project coordination and structured work, but core focus diverges.
scoring_notes.language_note: JD is entirely in German; working language is German. Candidate's B1+ is likely below threshold for effective daily work in a small German family business.
